Class ResourceHandleProto.DtypeAndShape.Builder

java.lang.Object
com.google.protobuf.AbstractMessageLite.Builder
com.google.protobuf.AbstractMessage.Builder<ResourceHandleProto.DtypeAndShape.Builder>
com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessage.Builder<ResourceHandleProto.DtypeAndShape.Builder>
org.tensorflow.proto.ResourceHandleProto.DtypeAndShape.Builder
All Implemented Interfaces:
Message.Builder, MessageLite.Builder, MessageLiteOrBuilder, MessageOrBuilder, Cloneable, ResourceHandleProto.DtypeAndShapeOrBuilder
Enclosing class:
ResourceHandleProto.DtypeAndShape
public static final class ResourceHandleProto.DtypeAndShape.Builder extends GeneratedMessage.Builder<ResourceHandleProto.DtypeAndShape.Builder> implements ResourceHandleProto.DtypeAndShapeOrBuilder
Protocol buffer representing a pair of (data type, tensor shape).
Protobuf type tensorflow.ResourceHandleProto.DtypeAndShape
